ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "video_title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the video */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the video thumbnail */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the video */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the video has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the video has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the video has received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the video */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, analyst, admin) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language preference of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the comment (0: negative, 1: neutral, 2: positive) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment, if the comment is a reply */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_sentiment FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment") REFERENCES sentiment_categories ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the reply is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was made */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the reply has received */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the reply (0: negative, 1: neutral, 2: positive) */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the reply has been edited */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the reply has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_sentiment FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment") REFERENCES sentiment_categories ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_categories" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment category */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a comment */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the version is associated with */,
  "version_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was edited */,
  "version_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the edit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_versions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_versions_version_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the video */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the video was viewed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the video was viewed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to view the video */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used to view the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_views_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user liking the video */,
  "like_date" TEXT /* Date the like was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_likes_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_dislikes" (
  "dislike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dislike event */,
  "video_id" TEXT /* ID of the video being disliked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user disliking the video */,
  "dislike_date" TEXT /* Date the dislike was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dislike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_dislikes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_dislikes_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES replies ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
